title: DRDVModal
description: Document Review & Validation modal — two stages (extraction + verification) with side-by-side comparison.

open.description: Whether the modal is visible. Bind to a state slot.

swaId.description: Shipment Workflow Activity ID. Bind to {{datasource.shipment.swa_id}}.

checklistTags.description: Checklist tags forwarded to the extraction + verification GETs.

checklistId.description: checklist_id required by the workflow API.

apiMode.description: `mock` returns a canned realistic response; `real` proxies to gocomet.

hideCtas.description: When true, hides ALL action buttons (verify/reject/reverify/retry/next) regardless of server-driven flags. Use for permission-gated views.
